title: Chill Out
lyrics: ♪♪ -♪ Yeah, chill out, my man, chill out tonight, hey ♪ ♪ Baby, chill out, come on, baby, chill out ♪ ♪ I'm not really fucking being mean, hey ♪ ♪ I'm not really wanting you to leave the scene, hey ♪ ♪ Chill out, chill out, chill out tonight, baby, come on ♪ ♪ Chill out, chill out, chill out, it's alright ♪ ♪ Chill out, chill out tonight, chill out, baby, come on ♪ ♪ It's alright, you know you don't want to go ♪ ♪ You know you like to take too much to run and go, oh-oh-oh ♪ ♪ But listen here, we got to talk a little bit about you ♪ ♪ I'm freezing, baby, chill out, chill out, come on ♪ ♪ Chill out, chill out, chill out, you're just acting a bit too much, yeah ♪ ♪ Hope is jealous, over in pursuit, so come on, baby, chill out, chill out, chill out, come on, yeah ♪ ♪ Chill out, chill out, chill out, it's alright, just sit back, relax ♪ ♪ Why you making it such a thing that we need to attack each other, uh-uh? ♪ ♪ It's alright, you should just chill out, we'll be together, no matter what ♪ ♪ Cause you're like my love and you're all that I got, chill out, chill out, chill out, baby ♪ ♪ Chill out, chill out, there is no maybe, you know, chill out, baby, come on, take my hand ♪ ♪ Let's go find another girl to get down with, come on, it's a plan, hey, hey ♪ ♪ You know you're the only one I want, baby, I adore you ♪ ♪ Think it's fire when I'm sitting next to you ♪ ♪ Man, you're the best thing that I've had in my life, so chill out ♪ ♪ There's no reason to get all whispy, just be happy, hippy, hoppy, can you see that it's just me? ♪ ♪ Sitting here, look in my eyes, baby, you're my queen, so chill out, chill out, chill out, chill out, chill out, chill out ♪ ♪ There's no reason, no reason why you're all up in my face, all hysterical, wait, chill out, baby, behave ♪ ♪ We can be like that, I ain't going nowhere, even after this fight, I'm still here till the morning ♪ ♪ No matter which way you wanna take it, left or the right, even if we fight every fucking night ♪ ♪ My loyalty's in some ring, clean as gold, crystal clear, baby, can't you see I've been through it all? ♪ ♪ I want you to just understand what I'm telling you, to chill out, there's no reason for you to be all, all, all, all like, oh my god, fucking what you're saying ♪ ♪ Come on, bitch, just chill out, you already know what I'm saying, cause I ain't playing, girl, we can do this in a million lifetimes, we can do it all the same ♪ ♪ There's no reason for you, no reason, so chill out, chill out, chill out, remember I'm all you are, want it more, chill out when you're next to me, chill out when you want more than you think you deserve, hey ♪ Thanks for watching!

♪ Baby, chill out, come on, baby, chill out ♪

♪ It's alright, you should just chill out, we'll be together, no matter what ♪
♪ Cause you're like my love and you're all that I got, chill out, chill out, chill out, baby ♪
♪ Chill out, chill out, there is no maybe, you know, chill out, baby, come on, take my hand ♪
♪ Let's go find another girl to get down with, come on, it's a plan, hey, hey ♪

♪ Think it's fire when I'm sitting next to you ♪
♪ Man, you're the best thing that I've had in my life, so chill out ♪

♪ Sitting here, look in my eyes, baby, you're my queen, so chill out, chill out, chill out, chill out, chill out, chill out ♪
♪ There's no reason, no reason why you're all up in my face, all hysterical, wait, chill out, baby, behave ♪
♪ We can be like that, I ain't going nowhere, even after this fight, I'm still here till the morning ♪
♪ No matter which way you wanna take it, left or the right, even if we fight every fucking night ♪
♪ My loyalty's in some ring, clean as gold, crystal clear, baby, can't you see I've been through it all? ♪
♪ I want you to just understand what I'm telling you, to chill out, there's no reason for you to be all, all, all, all like, oh my god, fucking what you're saying ♪
♪ Come on, bitch, just chill out, you already know what I'm saying, cause I ain't playing, girl, we can do this in a million lifetimes, we can do it all the same ♪

♪ There's no reason for you, no reason, so chill out, chill out, chill out, remember I'm all you are, want it more, chill out when you're next to me, chill out when you want more than you think you deserve, hey ♪
Thanks for watching!
